channel.title: Hospital on Expat Japan
channel.description: Recent content in Hospital on Expat Japan

item.title: Emergency Guide for Foreigners in Japan (Police, Fire, Hospital)
item.description: What to do in an emergency in Japan as a foreigner. Emergency numbers, what to say, how to get help in English, and what to do in an earthquake.

item.title: How to See a Doctor in Japan as a Foreigner (Complete Guide)
item.description: How to visit a clinic or hospital in Japan as a foreigner. What to bring, what to say, how to find English-speaking doctors, and what to expect.
